query: Help me create the WDS product brief — establish the strategic foundation, vision, positioning and target users for my new web app before we design anything.
I need the Phase 1 project brief for FreshBox: vision, business model, success criteria and constraints.
Let's establish project context and the strategic foundation for the design work — write the product brief.
Map our business goals to user psychology with personas and driving forces (wants and fears).
Turn the trigger map into linear sunshine-path UX scenario outlines exposing every page.
Onboard me to WDS and figure out if this is a greenfield or brownfield project and which phase to start in.
